flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bentley University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.9k → $61.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bentley University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.9k → $61.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bentley University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bentley University are 92% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($121.0k vs $63.2k).
